summary: v0.6.4: option-d perpendicular label offset (resolveLabelLineOffsets, folded FIRST into finishEdges; mirrored byte-for-byte in vnmRuntime for both renderEdges + toSvgString) lifts routed-edge labels off their line so it stays continuous; sequence messageLabel unified on the shared tightened labelPlateSize. Three as-built refinements satisfy the hard bar: (1) clearance uses the plate dimension FACING the line (half-width for a vertical run's right shift, half-height for a horizontal run's up shift); (2) off-line plate corners feed contentBounds (layout + applyPositions + runtime buildSvg) so a label never clips; (3) a final deCollideLabels pass runs LAST so node de-collision can't leave an offset label overlapping a neighbour (state fail/retry). Version bumped 4 sites. 401/401 unit+snapshot tests + 37/37 dom-runtime-parity green; snapshot churn is label-plate/text/viewBox only (nodes + edge paths unchanged); renders byte-deterministic.
